frozen_reason: Pre-committed chemistry promotion gate for SMILES validity, valence arithmetic, functional-group reasoning, and SCBE governance verdicts. The prompt set is deliberately small enough to run inline after Hugging Face Jobs training but non-empty so adapter pushes cannot pass on an empty gate.

dataset_boundary.unseen_eval_rule: Eval prompts below combine molecules, invalid structures, and lane-boundary checks without copying training rows verbatim. The model must explain the verification route rather than only naming a verdict.

thresholds.decision_rule: Adapter passes chemistry promotion only if pass_rate >= minimum_pass_rate and all must_pass prompts pass.

failure_modes.counts_as_failure: Returns PASS, HOLD, or DENY without walking atoms, bonds, valence, or RDKit validity.
Promotes a structurally invalid molecule such as pentavalent carbon or nonsense SMILES.
Claims code-token structural chemistry is material chemistry when the input is not a real chemical formula or molecule.
Omits SCBE fusion, tau_hat, valence pressure, coherence, or governance verdict for molecule checks.

prompts.prompt: Verify ethanol from SMILES CCO. Walk the chemistry route explicitly: atoms, bonds, valence count, electronegativity or polarity, functional group, RDKit validity, SCBE fusion signal, and final governance verdict.
Verify aspirin from SMILES CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O. Explain the aromatic ring, ester, carboxylic acid, validity check, valence pressure, and promotion verdict.
A molecule is proposed as C(C)(C)(C)(C)C. Verify whether it should promote. Walk the explicit valence arithmetic and state the governance verdict.

Verify NaCl as an ionic boundary case. Explain why it is not an organic functional-group example, but can still be handled as a valid chemistry tokenization case with a conservative governance verdict.
Explain the boundary between material chemistry verification and structural atomic tokenizer metaphors. When the input is code token queue_drain_guard, what must the chemistry agent avoid claiming?
